title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0092 10 Melvin Square and 1 Ilminster Avenue, Knowle, Bristol City, Bristol, BS4 1LZ
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Kevin Patel  Site address:  10 Melvin Square and 1 Ilminster Avenue, Knowle, Bristol City, Bristol, BS4 1LZ  Description of proposed development:  Ground, first and second floor extensions to 10 Melvin Square and first floor side extension to 1 Ilminster Avenue, to create 2no. large HMOs (1no. 9-bed, 1no. 7-bed), with cycle storage and retail storage at ground floor level (resubmission of planning permission 24/00433/F).  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 21 March 2025   Date by when representations must be made 30 April 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 16 May 2025   Decision date 20 May 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 157 KB, 12 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 30 April 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0092 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     240204 cover letter 10MS FINAL  (PDF, 914 KB, 6 pages)  APPLICATION_FORM  (PDF, 1.08 MB, 15 pages)  10 Melvin Square - Design Access and HMO Statement  (PDF, 1.69 MB, 9 pages)  24 00433 F-ENERGY STATEMENT-3617447  (PDF, 625 KB, 8 pages)  532-PLA-001_EXISTING SITE LOCATION & SITE PLAN  (PDF, 439 KB, 1 page)  532-PLA-010_EXISTING GROUND FLOOR PLAN  (PDF, 1.53 MB, 1 page)  532-PLA-011_EXISTING FIRST FLOOR PLAN  (PDF, 1.49 MB, 1 page)  532-PLA-012_EXISTING SECOND FLOOR  (PDF, 1.13 MB, 1 page)  532-PLA-013_EXISTING ROOF PLAN  (PDF, 1.13 MB, 1 page)  532-PLA-020_EXISTING NORTH-EAST ELEVATION  (PDF, 554 KB,...
